Setlist
DMB + Flecktones
Going back to the now-famous run of shows in late December 1996, banjoist BÃ©la Fleck has been one of the most common and most beloved guests to sit in with DMB. But occasionally the whole band, BÃ©la Fleck & the Flecktones, sit in (often while on a run of opening shows for DMB), leading to some of the longest performances of DMB songs in history (including all of the current top 10).

This list focuses on the times at least 3 members of the band have guested with DMB together. The Flecktones lineup has changed somewhat throughout their 35+ year history, but members who have sat in with DMB include BÃ©la Fleck (banjo), Victor Wooten (bass), Futureman (synthaxe drumitar), Paul McCandless (saxophone), of course Jeff Coffin who is now DMB's full time sax player and Howard Levy (harmonica) who rejoined the Flecktones after Jeff left and guested in 2025 for the first time.

Frequent songs:
#41 - 15
Ants Marching - 6
Two Step - 3
All Along the Watchtower - 2
Jimi Thing - 2
Date Location Song Length Personnel Release
